node.html:
• Project #1: A .NET and VueJS based web app that provides UI to control systems. Deployed on Windows and Linux.
    • Optimize UI performance
    • Reduce CPU usage by 50% on Linux
    • Migrate from NancyFx hosting to ASP.NET
    • Provide bugfixes and new features for 1.5+ years
  • Project #2: Mobile app project based in .NET MAUI also designed to interface with control systems, providing easy access in the field.
    • Set up Jenkins pipeline for CI/CD
    • Configure Play Console (Android) and App Store Connect (iOS) for deploying app bundles
    • Implement general features while working with 2 other teammates
    • Work a little bit with AWS S3 to upload and download user/application level files
  • Project #3: Web app based in AWS Amplify to streamline the process of remote support
    • Create and read DynamoDB tables and forward data through API gateway
    • Utilize the concept of Amplify environments to work in isolation and reduce conflicts with team members
    • Make use of various AWS services like ECS, SES, and Cognito

frontmatter.company_fullname: JCA Technologies - part of PTx Trimble

node.html:
• Expanded system accessibility to all browsers by independently migrating an HTML, CSS-based system to Django
  • Migrated 100+ AccessDB files to MySQL server using Python scripts and consolidated them into 10 tables. This minimized data redundancy and enhanced data integrity and efficiency
  • Reduced project onboarding time by 30% through detailed ”How to” articles and implementation details
